zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Ferrers於大約1230年出生在英國德比夏爾德比時，她的父親Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby39歲，母親Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby30歲。她於大約1245年與Simon de Kyme, Lord of Kyme結婚。她去世於1299年3月12日在英國萊希斯特斯爾艾維頓享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Ferrers was born about 1230, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, was 39 and her mother, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, was 30. She married Simon de Kyme, Lord of Kyme about 1245. She died on 12 March 1299, in Evington, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Ferrers est née environ 1230, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Simon de Kyme, Lord of Kyme environ 1245. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1299, à Evington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Ferrers(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1245년 Simon de Kyme, Lord of Kyme(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1299년 3월 12일 영국 레이스스터실르 에빙턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Ferrers родилась около 1230 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Marshall , Countess of Derby, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon de Kyme, Lord of Kyme около 1245 г. Она умерла 12 марта 1299 г. в местности эвингтон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.
